intro: Every release listed newest first. We follow SemVer.

v0.7.0.title: ColorModeSwitch + mobile UX + component fixes
items: New public component: ColorModeSwitch with full docs page.
Tooltip fully refactored — better positioning, scoped theme, arrow & delay support.
Avatar icon fallback now respects the color prop.
DateRangeField auto-collapses to 1-month view on mobile.
Combobox: added touchstart support for mobile devices.
PopoverPanel: switched to overflow-y-auto so tall content scrolls correctly.
ToastContainer: CSS variable style now propagates to all zones.
CalendarMonthView: improved draggable event rendering.
Theme Studio customizer redesigned to match ShowroomSettings style.
Mobile header: section pill moved to right cluster next to color mode switch.
Mobile drawer now includes search and language switcher.
Fixed: mobile section sheet no longer shows Documentation as active when on Home.
i18n: extracted all remaining hardcoded strings from showroom pages (ES/EN).

v0.6.0.title: Docs overhaul + full i18n
items: ComponentDoc + ComponentPreview system with isolated ModoProvider.
Migrated ~50 component pages to ComponentDoc system.
Full ES/EN translations for all component pages.
TOC scroll-spy for navigation.
Reset button on ComponentPreview toolbar.
Unified design system across all doc pages.

v0.5.2.title: Showroom polish + a11y
items: New surface-preset picker inside the settings popover.
Search palette now uses the native SearchInput component.
View transitions between routes (Chromium / Safari TP).
Lighter welcome headline with scroll-reveal animations.
"Star on GitHub" button in the header, translated ES/EN.

v0.5.0.title: Templates + theme studio
items: Templates: Dashboard, Auth, Pricing and Settings.
Interactive Theme Studio with live preview.
New Scheduler component with drag & drop.
Support for 6 dark surface presets.

v0.4.0.title: Calendar suite + Table
items: Calendar, MonthView, WeekView, DayView, AgendaView.
Table: virtualization, multi-sort, server-side, tree rows.
DateRangePicker and DateTimePicker.

v0.3.0.title: Dark surfaces + i18n
items: Dark surface presets (navy, zinc, charcoal, midnight, forest).
Built-in i18n with ES/EN dicts.
useToast / useConfirm composables.

v0.1.0.title: First public release
items: 40+ base components.
ModoProvider with reactive theming.
Tailwind v4 + design tokens.

next.themingDesc: Tokens, palettes, surfaces and dark mode.
